title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Ergo - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Ergo - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Ergo in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Ergo:
HDFC Ergo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo!
